name: Potatoes Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cook and stir onion in butter in a 2-quart saucepan until tender.
3. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is smooth and bubbly; remove from heat.
4. Stir in half-and-half and 1 1/2 cups of cheese. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly. Boil and stir for 1 minute.
5. Place potatoes in an ungreased 1 1/2-quart casserole.
6. Pour cheese sauce over the potatoes.
7. Bake uncovered until the top is brown and bubbly, about 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours.
8. Mix remaining cheese and bread crumbs; sprinkle over casserole.
9. Raise temperature to broil and broil 3 to 4 inches from heat until the top is crusty and light brown, about 4 minutes.
10. Optionally omit broiling step if desired.
11. Bake casserole uncovered for 1 hour; sprinkle with cheese-crumb mixture.
12. Continue baking until the top is brown and bubbly, about 15 to 30 minutes.
